feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP HANA Log Restore Using NetBackup on a Different System
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have a HANA database (log mode: normal) that is being backed up via NetBackup — both full data backups and log backups.

Now I’m restoring the backups to a different HANA system.

Here are my two scenarios:

Scenario 1 – Restore Only Logs After Full Backup Already Restored:

I have already restored the full backup from 9 PM.

Now I want to restore only the log backups, on top of that, without re-restoring the full backup.

But when I try to do that, it starts restoring the full backup again.

→ How can I restore only the logs after full backup is already restored?

Scenario 2 – Restore Logs Up to a Specific Time:

I want to restore logs only up to two hours after the full backup (i.e., until 11 PM).

How can I control the log restore process to stop at a specific point in time?

Any help or step-by-step guidance (using HANA Studio, or Backint) would be really appreciated.

Thanks a lot!

entry.title: ATC Configuration for Custom code analysis
entry.content:
Hi Team,

ATC Configuration: to include the our satellite system in to the ATC Central system for Custom code analysis. Both systems are on HANA database.

Thanks & Regards.

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Custom Consignment Process
entry.content:
Dear Gurus, I will explain my requirement and my configuration knowledge on this.

Requirement: I want to issue the stock (material 1) to customer A. but not to be billed. Customer A will sale the material 1 to another 50 different customers and i need to bill the 50 different customers not customer A.  Now when i am creating consignment issue to other 50 different customers, the stock should get deducted from the customer A consignment stock.

My Thought: I want to create consignment fill up to Customer 1000 with material M10. Now customer 1000 will again sell the material M10 to 10 other end customers. I want to create Consignment Issue to 10 end customers for the same material M10, while doing PGI, the M10 stock has to pick from "Customer 1000's consignment stock". Not from the unrestricted stock of my inventory. 

I know the standard Consignment process where Fill up and Issue to the same customer. But here i required to Fill up to one customer and Issue to other customers.

My functional expertise is not enough for this requirement. Requesting anyone who can fulfil this.

Please through some light and help me out of this requirement.

entry.title: PREP_GENCHECKS/EU_NAMETAB_CHECKERORR during upgrade from 1809 to 2023
entry.content:
i got this error when try to upgrade form 1809 to 2023

"Severe error(s) occurred in phase PREP_GENCHECKS/EU_NAMETAB_CHECK!"
A2 EEXP 017 Table DDNTT will be exported joined with fields table.
A3EESTR 001 Error for '/TMF/V_CC405_001': Field count 14 differs from header field count 0
A3EEEXP 008 Task failed with error: (EXP) Found 1 problems in data
A3EEEXP 008 (EXP) Table name is 'DDNTT'

can somebody help with this error?

entry.title: Error- Identification of Condition SAP TDMS Time Slice Option
entry.content:
Hi,

We are getting the error while running the TDMS Time Slice project during the step 'Update of TDMS Header Tables with Business Process Data' at Step 'Identification of Condition Data'

Error in Log

We have raised an incident with SAP 336077/2025 we are still waiting for solution its been many weeks.

SAP advised to run the below query in Sender system which we have successfully executed and provided the results.

( SELECT a.knumv FROM SAPABAP1.LIKP as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.CNVTDMS_05_VBUK as b on a.VBELN = b.VBELN WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION ( SELECT a.knump FROM SAPABAP1.LIKP as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.CNVTDMS_05_VBUK as b on a.VBELN = b.VBELN WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION ( SELECT a.knumv FROM SAPABAP1.VBAK as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.CNVTDMS_05_VBUK as b on a.VBELN = b.VBELN WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION ( SELECT a.knumv FROM SAPABAP1.VBRK as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.CNVTDMS_05_VBUK as b on a.VBELN = b.VBELN WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION ( SELECT a.knumv FROM SAPABAP1.EKBE as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.CNVTDMS_05_EKKO as b on a.ebeln = b.ebeln WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION ( SELECT a.knumv FROM SAPABAP1.EKKO as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.CNVTDMS_05_EKKO as b on a.ebeln = b.ebeln WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION SELECT KNUMV FROM SAPABAP1.EKBEH WHERE MANDT = 800 AND BUDAT >= 20240601 UNION ( SELECT a.knumv FROM SAPABAP1.WBRK as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.CNVTDMS_05_WBRK as b on a.wbeln = b.wbeln WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION ( SELECT a.knumvd FROM SAPABAP1.WBRK as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.CNVTDMS_05_WBRK as b on a.wbeln = b.wbeln WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION SELECT KKNUMV FROM SAPABAP1.ESLL WHERE ( BUDAT >= 20240601 OR BUDAT = 00000000 ) OR ( INSDT >= 20240601 OR INSDT = 00000000 ) UNION ( SELECT a.knumv FROM SAPABAP1.ESLH as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.ESLL as b on a.packno = b.packno WHERE b.MANDT = 800 AND ( b.BUDAT >= 20240601 OR b.BUDAT = 00000000 OR b.INSDT >= 20240601 OR b.INSDT = 00000000 ) ) UNION SELECT knumv FROM SAPABAP1.rbdrseg WHERE ( BUDAT >= 20240601 ) UNION SELECT knumv FROM SAPABAP1.vfkp WHERE ( BUDAT >= 20240601 ) OR ( prsdt >= 20240601 ) UNION ( SELECT a.eknum FROM SAPABAP1.wkbp as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.cnvtdms_05_wkbk as b on a.kbeln = b.kbeln WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION ( SELECT a.vknum FROM SAPABAP1.wkbp as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.cnvtdms_05_wkbk as b on a.kbeln = b.kbeln WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION ( SELECT a.cknum FROM SAPABAP1.wkbp as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.cnvtdms_05_wkbk as b on a.kbeln = b.kbeln WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION ( SELECT a.knumv_sd FROM SAPABAP1.wbhk as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.cnvtdms_05_wbhk as b on a.tkonn = b.tkonn WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION ( SELECT a.knumv_mm FROM SAPABAP1.wbhd as a INNER JOIN SAPABAP1.cnvtdms_05_wbhk as b on a.tkonn = b.tkonn WHERE a.MANDT = 800 AND b.packid = '9001B' ) UNION SELECT knumv FROM "SAPABAP1"."/DBM/SPLHDR_DB" WHERE MANDT = 800 UNION SELECT h_knumv FROM "SAPABAP1"."/DBM/VBAK_DB" WHERE MANDT = 800 

We are facing this issue after the migrate our database to SAP Hana and we have upgrade the TDMS Backend component to DMIS and DMIS_CNT 2011_1_731 to SP 0027.

Can some pls provide the solution.

SAP Test Data Migration Server SAP HANA, express edition

entry.title: XSA - CAP: xsuaadomain is missing in credentials
entry.content:
We are developing a CAP Application for Hana XSA. I deployed a node.js Backend and an Approuter. I have bound the xsuaa-service to both apps.
If I now try to get data from my odata-service, i receive an error: Error while authenticating user: XsuaaService is missing the properties uaadomain inside its credentials for: fetch JWKS.

I have tried to set the uaadomain in the credentials manually. But this has no effect.I have also tried to deploy the app without Approuter and Xsuaa, but when I do, I get the error message that authentication is required.

Link to Github GitHub

entry.title: SAP HANA Replication task(.hdbreptask) - runtime object?
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

I intend to document the hdbreptasks which were created in my project. The list is more than 50 and the idea is to have access to view/table in which the rep tasks can be accessed along with the tables configured in it.

I tried multiple system views and could not find a one which gives me data. 

Any help is appreciated.

entry.title: SAP B1 HANA approval using queries
entry.content:
Can anyone please guide me through approval stages in sap b1.I am using HANA dB.Currently I am implementing approval for purchase request.And I have udf field included in header table with valid values:PO and Good Issue.Currently if we link one approval stages with template(with 4 authorizers),it defaults to parallel approval where the approval document is sent to every users included in authorizers.So to simulate sequential authorization in such a way that only after first user approve,it will be forwarded to second approver based on value in Udf I have mentioned already,I have created stages each involving one approver and linked them all to one approval template.It should be like if value is PO,the approval should activate but if it is Good Issue,no approval needed.Here is my HANA approval query SELECT DISTINCT 'TRUE'

FROM DUMMY T0

WHERE $[OPRQ.U_PR_TYPE] = 'PO'.

Now the problem is it works for first approver ,but subsequent approval for approver 2,3 and 4 does not work.Can anyone help me how to get this right

entry.title: BW on Hana data redistribution after adding a new node.
entry.content:
We have added a new node to the existing cluster for BW PERSON_NAME on Prem cluster. We don't see any data on the 4th Node. We would like to know if there is an additional process that is needed to redistribute the data or if any other steps needs to be performed. Also, if there any SAP Notes on this, please provide us the same.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Item was saved inconsistently in PMR
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

When I running /SCWM/PMR for PMR in Embedded EWM, the system showed the error "Item was saved inconsistently". 

the Item status:

The Item detail:

Could you please give me some suggestion? 

Regards

Vincent

entry.title: Transaction - /SCWM/RFUI - To load second screen of the Main Menu directly
entry.content: In Transaction /SCWM/RFUI, additional keys have been added to the Main Menu screen via config, and the requirement is to display the second screen first but without changing the key values for the respective buttons.

entry.title: Reforma tributária, CBS3 IBS3 via MIGO?
entry.content:
A Sapnote: 3569061 entrega a solução para MM, mas há NF que não são geradas por SD e são geradas via MIGO diretamente pelo movimento sem referencia a pedido.

É comum empresas terem diversos movimentos para enviar produtos a seus fornecedores via MIGO. Na J1BTAX > ADMINISTRAÇÃO DE ESTOQUES > CADEIAS DE CONTABILIZAÇÃO AI é possível ver a derivação desses casos.

Atualmente estas notas de forma Standard não vão derivar o CBS3 IB3S, teria que entrar na J1B2N e colocar manualmente ou via BADI.

Eu abri um chamado sobre o assunto na SAP perguntando se vão entregar algo para este caso, eu fiz um teste e a solução entregue não funcionou para este caso!

Eduardo

----------

Recebi a resposta abaixo, entendo então que NF que forem geradas via MOV de MM se se julgar necessário destacar CBS3 ou IB3S teremos que faze-lo via BADI.

entry.title: Executing BW Queries in background mode
entry.content:
Hi Community, 

We are using SAP S/4 HANA On premise with Fiori. 

I am looking for ways to improve query performance. Some queries which are created with the fiori app: "custom analytical queries" are taking too long to load, resulting in browser errors. Therefore, I am also looking for ways to execute these BW queries in the background. Either via SAP GUI or SAP Fiori. Can anyone help me? 

Via other community posts I see the transaction RSBATCH coming up several times but the transaction is not very user friendly. Is this the right way forward?  


Many thanks in advance.

entry.title: Problem in BDC recording for Transaction code - OVXC
entry.content: When I am recording BDC for transaction OVXC, I can assign a particular shipping point to the plant by checking the the checkbox. but if i again try to process the same BDC, system not checking the checkbox of the shipping point. kindly help on this.

entry.title: Does "HANA System Replication" support the replication between systems with different S4HANA version
entry.content:
Here SAP described the situation for Zero downtime during upgrade:

Use SAP HANA System Replication for Near Zero Downtime Upgrades: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_PLATFORM/4e9b18c116aa42fc84c7dbfd02111aba/ee3fd9a0c2e74733a74e4ad140fde60b.html?version=2.0.05

Does this support the SAP HANA databased upgrade only? or does it support also S4HANA upgrade?

for example, if we upgrade secondary system to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2023 FPS03, and the primary system is on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2023 FPS02, will the replication still working for primary system to secondary system?

entry.title: ATC for AUTHORITY-CHECK
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,
     I have implemented in ATC if a program has AUTHORITY-CHECK, but when releasing the request it is only validating in Functions or Methods.
     When I release the request that has a type 1 program the verification is not performed.
     Can anyone tell me what is missing?
     Thank you very much
Regards

entry.title: Difference between MMBE and MB52
entry.content:
Hello, 

As In SAP MM module MB51 is used to view material document list and MMSC is used extend one material to another storage location of that plant. Can anyone please the difference between MMBE and MB52?

Regards,

Rutvij Moghe 

SAP MM Consultant

entry.title: Dismantle Machine
entry.content:
Q. what is the standard SAP Process of Dismantle Machine 

How to Dismantle Machine With Serial Number Profile as per Confirmation Component,

entry.title: How to make visible customer data item level tab for PO with item category E
entry.content:
Hello,
in our purchase orders we have a customer data tab at item level which was created with enhancement MM06E005. This is working  fine except when we use item category E (Enhanced Limit), where the tab disappears.

I have checked BADI ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST and method FIELDSELECTION_ITEM. I do not find any existing coding to make this tab visible/invisible. I tried this code. but when it comes to item category E program does not stop at breakpoint in BADI. Also I try breakpoint in enhancement exits and does not stop either.

    l_changeable = im_header->is_changeable( ).
    LOOP AT ch_fieldselection REFERENCE INTO DATA(ld_fieldselection)
                                  WHERE metafield = mmmfd_cust_10.
      IF l_changeable IS INITIAL.
        ld_fieldselection->fieldstatus = '*'. " Display
      ELSE.
        ld_fieldselection->fieldstatus = '+'. " Change
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.

In transaction SPRO there are no options to handle customer data tab visibility.

Anyone has faced this issue?

Thanks.

entry.title: What product do you register HANA Cockpit as on the SAP Support Portal?
entry.content: I am having an issue with my HANA Cockpit and need to open an issue with SAP.  What product should I user when I register the system?
